Wave5a.name: 共识持久化
Wave5a.description: DB Migration v7 + ByzantineStore + SqliteByzantineStore + 密钥加密 + Manager 集成 + 测试

Wave5b.name: 离线同步 (LWW + HLC)
Wave5b.description: HLC 时钟 + 变更追踪 + LWW 冲突解决 + 同步协议 + REST API + 30 测试

Wave5c.name: TLS 支持 (缩减版)
Wave5c.description: TLS 配置 + 自签名证书 + Server 集成 + 部署模板 + 测试

previous_plan.notes: Wave 3+4 COMPLETE. Wave 5 completed in separate plan.

design_decisions.D1-P3_keypair: AES-GCM encrypted persistence to SQLite (agent persistent identity)
design_decisions.D6_timestamp: Hybrid Logical Clock (causal ordering, columnar storage in SQLite)
design_decisions.D4_scope: Reduced to TLS config + self-signed + Caddy/Nginx templates (no built-in ACME)

notes: Wave 5 COMPLETE — all 22/22 tasks done. 1548 tests passing. D1-P3 (consensus persistence) + D4-lite (TLS) + D6 (offline sync with HLC+LWW).
